heading: Data Management Consulting
subheading: Building Reliable, Governed, and Scalable Data Foundations for Modern Enterprises
content:
Iseyon helps organizations establish strong data management frameworks that ensure data accuracy, consistency, security, and accessibility.  Iseyon Data Management Consulting services enable enterprises to transform fragmented data environments into structured, governed, and high-performing ecosystems that support analytics, AI, and strategic decision-making. Gartner has estimated that poor data quality costs organizations an average of [$12.9 million per year globally (Gartner, 2016). ](https://www.gartner.com/en/data-analytics/topics/data-quality)According to Forrester, establishing a strong data governance foundation is key to [transforming data into organizational insights](https://www.forrester.com/blogs/data-governance-your-key-to-unlocking-an-insights-driven-business/) and enabling analytics success.

> "Organizations that treat data as a strategic asset and manage it with the same rigor as financial assets consistently outperform peers on analytics ROI, regulatory compliance, and operational efficiency."  — Research Sources

> "Organizations are constantly seeking ways to gain a competitive edge by transforming data into actionable insights through analytics."  — [Forrester,2024](https://www.forrester.com/blogs/data-governance-your-key-to-unlocking-an-insights-driven-business)

#### **Data Strategy & Governance Framework**

Iseyon defines comprehensive data management strategies aligned with business objectives. Iseyon's governance frameworks establish clear ownership, policies, standards, and controls to ensure data quality, compliance, and accountability across the organization. Industry research underscores that strong data governance reduces risks associated with poor data quality, lowers operational costs, and [improves analytics ROI ](https://www.dataversity.net/articles/data-governance-important-business-intelligence-success)by enabling trusted, consistent data across the organization.

#### **Master Data Management (MDM)**

Iseyon designs and implements master data solutions that create a single, trusted source of truth for critical business entities such as customers, products, and suppliers. Iseyon's MDM frameworks improve consistency, reduce duplication, and enhance cross-functional collaboration.

#### **Data Quality & Standardization**

Iseyon implements data profiling, cleansing, validation, and standardization processes to ensure high data accuracy and reliability. Our solutions improve operational efficiency and enable confident decision-making based on trusted data.

#### **Data Architecture & Integration**

Iseyon designs scalable and flexible data architectures that support seamless integration across systems, applications, and platforms. Using modern integration tools and APIs, Iseyon ensures smooth data flow across enterprise environments.

#### **Metadata Management & Lineage**

Iseyon implements metadata management solutions to provide visibility into data definitions, usage, and lineage. This enhances transparency, auditability, and regulatory compliance while enabling better data discovery and collaboration.

#### **Data Security & Compliance**

Iseyon establishes enterprise-grade security frameworks, including access controls, encryption, and monitoring. Iseyon solutions ensure regulatory compliance and protect sensitive data across on-premise and cloud environments.

#### **Data Lifecycle Management**

Iseyon defines policies for data retention, archival, and disposal to optimize storage costs and maintain compliance. Iseyon's lifecycle management strategies ensure data remains accessible, secure, and relevant throughout its lifespan.

#### **Cloud & Hybrid Data Management**

Iseyon supports data management across cloud, hybrid, and on-premise environments. Iseyon solutions ensure consistency, governance, and scalability regardless of infrastructure strategy.

#### **Modernization & Optimization**

Iseyon helps organizations modernize legacy data systems and implement automation to improve performance, reduce operational complexity, and enhance overall data efficiency creating a future-ready data management ecosystem.

#### **Cost of Poor Data Quality: Business Domain Impact Framework**

| Business Domain         | Common Data Issue                                | Annual Business Impact (Researched)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Recommended Mitigation                               |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| Finance & Accounting    | Duplicate records, reconciliation errors         | Part of Gartner’s finding that poor data quality costs organizations an average of \~$12.9 M per year across domains. [(Gartner)](https://www.gartner.com/en/data-analytics/topics/data-quality)                                                                             | Master Data Management (MDM) with quality rules      |
| Customer / CRM Data     | Inconsistent customer IDs, stale contact records | Forrester survey: many organizations lose >$5 M annually due to poor data quality, with some >$25 M.[ (Forrester)](https://www.forrester.com/report/millions-lost-in-2023-due-to-poor-data-quality-potential-for-billions-to-be-lost-with-ai-without-intervention/RES181258) | Golden record management & identity resolution       |
| Supply Chain            | Inaccurate SKU, inventory data                   | Gartner’s average cost figure applies here, especially where inconsistent source data drives inefficiencies.                                                                                                                                                                 | Real-time validation & standardized master item data |
| Regulatory & Compliance | Missing lineage, audit gaps                      | Poor quality increases likelihood of compliance issues and penalties (implicit in higher average cost). [(Alation)](https://www.alation.com/blog/data-quality-challenges-large-scale-data-environments)                                                                      | Metadata & lineage tracking with audit trails        |
| Analytics & BI          | Bad source data → misleading insights            | Bad data affects analytics, contributing to costly mis-decisions as part of overall poor data quality cost. [(Gartner)](https://www.gartner.com/en/data-analytics/topics/data-quality)                                                                                       | Data quality scorecards & automated profiling        |

faqs.question: What Data Management Consulting services does Iseyon provide?
faqs.answer: Iseyon delivers comprehensive data management consulting services including data strategy development, governance framework implementation, master data management (MDM), data quality improvement, architecture design, integration, security, lifecycle management, and modernization. We help organizations transform fragmented data environments into structured, governed, and high-performing ecosystems that support analytics and AI initiatives.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon establish a strong data governance framework?
faqs.answer: Iseyon defines enterprise-wide governance strategies that include clear data ownership, standardized policies, compliance controls, and accountability measures. Our frameworks ensure data accuracy, consistency, regulatory compliance, and transparency across departments and systems.

faqs.question: Can Iseyon implement Master Data Management (MDM) solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, Iseyon designs and deploys MDM frameworks that create a single, trusted source of truth for critical entities such as customers, products, and suppliers. Our solutions reduce duplication, improve consistency, and enhance collaboration across business units.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon ensure data quality, security, and compliance?
faqs.answer: Iseyon implements data profiling, cleansing, validation, metadata management, lineage tracking, encryption, and role-based access controls to ensure high data quality and enterprise-grade security. Our approach supports audit readiness, regulatory compliance, and secure data operations across cloud and on-premise environments.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon support cloud, hybrid, and legacy data modernization?
faqs.answer: Iseyon designs scalable data architectures that integrate seamlessly across cloud, hybrid, and on-premise systems. We modernize legacy data platforms, automate workflows, optimize storage through lifecycle management policies, and improve performanceâ€”creating a future-ready, cost-efficient data management ecosystem.
